description.value:
Material: Seastone

A dense, sea-grey mineral mined from the ocean floor. It resonates with the same mysterious energy as the sea itself. To Devil Fruit users, even brief contact feels like drowning.

Sea-Bound Interaction: A creature with the Sea-Bound trait who carries, is bound by, or is struck by a Seastone item triggers their Sea-Bound condition (Slowed 1, Clumsy 1, Devil Fruit abilities suppressed) for as long as contact is maintained.

Seastone does not affect creatures without the Sea-Bound trait.

Hardness 9 / HP 36 / BT 18 (Low-Grade) — see the Seastone material entry for Standard and High grades.
